spec.description: UniFi Poller v2.0.1 Displays detailed information for clients in a UniFi network using Prometheus.

spec.title: Clients / AP Radio
spec.description: Visualize how many clients are connected to which radios/APs.

spec.title: Client MAC OUI Breakdown
spec.description: This shows an OUI breakdown from Unifi's perspective. e = wired, w = wireless

spec.title: Client Bandwidth: Cameras
spec.description: Cameras TX / RX bytes per second. Rx is on the negative axis. This graph shows any device with the word "camera" in its name and has nothing to do with UniFi Protect/video products. e = wired, w = wireless

spec.title: Switch Bandwidth / Wired Devices
spec.description: Wired TX / RX bytes per second (calculated in 30 second buckets). Rx is on the negative axis. Does not include amazon and camera devices. Unaffected by the AP setting.

spec.title: Wireless Devices
spec.description:
This table represents current (latest) data.
Bytes columns are lifetime totals.

spec.title: Wired Devices
spec.description:
This table represents current (latest) data.
Bytes columns are lifetime totals.

spec.title: Client Bandwidth / Echos & FireTVs
spec.description: Amazon Devices TX / RX bytes per second. Rx is on the negative axis. My home network has a ton of Amazon devices, so I broke them out separately. If you don't have Amazon devices, or they have different names, you can edit the query to use a different name. e = wired, w = wireless

spec.title: UAP Bandwidth / Wireless Devices
spec.description: Bandwidth usage per wireless devices as reported by the UAPs. Rx is on the negative axis. Does not include amazon devices.

spec.title: Clients / Channel
spec.description: Visualize wireless channel usage w/ wired client counts.

spec.title: UniFi-Poller: Client Insights - Prometheus
